idCamHeroLead:
A Morse taper implant system
that provides a sealed connection and stable fixation.
idCamHeroBullet2: A smooth transition from placement to restoration
idCamHeroBullet3: Platform and length selection for the clinical task
idCamAdvantage1Text: The 2.5° Morse taper reduces micromobility and preserves fixation.
idCamAdvantage2Text: Platforms and lengths for different clinical scenarios.
idCamAdvantage3Text: The thread and body shape help keep the protocol stable without deviation.
idCamDetailsTitle: Fixation and sealing at every stage
idCamDetailsLead:
ID CAM was developed for predictable implantation and restoration.
The system preserves stability and simplifies selection across different clinical scenarios.
idCamFinalCtaTitle: Ready to work consistently in every clinical case?
idCamFinalCtaText: We will match ID CAM to your clinical task.
